  "confidence_score": 0.95,
  "attack_summary": "A PowerShell process executed, establishing persistence by creating a hidden, system-level scheduled task named 'MordorElevated' with an encoded command. It further wrote obfuscated PowerShell code to an unusual registry location for potential future execution or evasion. The attacker then initiated a system restart, likely to activate persistence or hinder forensic analysis.",
